6a2719f8-e466-4298-b1d5-972b0b3bfe9c.name: Prompt
6a2719f8-e466-4298-b1d5-972b0b3bfe9c.label: basic
6a2719f8-e466-4298-b1d5-972b0b3bfe9c.description:
Describe the motion, action, camera movement, and audio to generate from the source image. Write the prompt as a clear chronological shot description with concrete visual details and sound cues.

[Prompting guide: key elements](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#key-elements-to-include)
[Prompting guide: best results](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#for-best-results)

value.immediate: futuristic clock spinning fast all symbols morphing glitch music ambient noise

9826f311-6cb1-4c33-a506-f95c1ab6f59e.name: Reference Image
9826f311-6cb1-4c33-a506-f95c1ab6f59e.label: basic
9826f311-6cb1-4c33-a506-f95c1ab6f59e.description: Starting image used to anchor composition, identity, and framing.

7549d82e-54a9-4778-acfc-9dec434b7870.name: Mode
7549d82e-54a9-4778-acfc-9dec434b7870.label: config
7549d82e-54a9-4778-acfc-9dec434b7870.description: Choose the generation branch. Turbo is faster for iteration; Full is slower and intended for higher quality.

d3d93f85-1127-4453-9846-237c20083028.name: Resolution
d3d93f85-1127-4453-9846-237c20083028.label: config
d3d93f85-1127-4453-9846-237c20083028.description:
Choose a preset output size. Higher resolutions need more VRAM, and dimensions must stay divisible by 32.

[Official image-to-video guide: resolution](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#resolution)

c8566a41-9bc6-4318-bcb9-f5b567784aab.name: Landscape Width
c8566a41-9bc6-4318-bcb9-f5b567784aab.label: hidden
c8566a41-9bc6-4318-bcb9-f5b567784aab.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape widths.

3a0fa31a-0916-4ea3-acde-5aa55f2a38b7.name: Landscape Height
3a0fa31a-0916-4ea3-acde-5aa55f2a38b7.label: hidden
3a0fa31a-0916-4ea3-acde-5aa55f2a38b7.description: Choose between the Full HD and HD landscape heights.

eb48a657-6901-445c-a4c9-d20f5bfc8abc.name: Full Sampling Steps
eb48a657-6901-445c-a4c9-d20f5bfc8abc.label: advanced
eb48a657-6901-445c-a4c9-d20f5bfc8abc.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Full mode. Higher values can improve quality but take longer.

34e2e6f1-3db8-4404-9457-2139e0e891b3.name: Distilled LoRA Weight
34e2e6f1-3db8-4404-9457-2139e0e891b3.label: advanced
34e2e6f1-3db8-4404-9457-2139e0e891b3.description: Strength of the distilled LoRA applied to the base model.

1877abc8-d74a-4f09-b24d-5c71b36fea77.name: Full Distilled LoRA Weight
1877abc8-d74a-4f09-b24d-5c71b36fea77.label: advanced
1877abc8-d74a-4f09-b24d-5c71b36fea77.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Full branch. The current official full-model guide recommends 0.6 for the Stage 2 distilled LoRA.

91d21dc9-ed11-4fbd-ab54-e468180dadc0.name: Turbo Distilled LoRA Weight
91d21dc9-ed11-4fbd-ab54-e468180dadc0.label: advanced
91d21dc9-ed11-4fbd-ab54-e468180dadc0.description: Distilled LoRA strength for the Turbo branch.

8426e9a0-975b-4b73-8f71-1d493ea668dc.name: Adapter LoRA Strength
8426e9a0-975b-4b73-8f71-1d493ea668dc.label: advanced
8426e9a0-975b-4b73-8f71-1d493ea668dc.description: Strength for the optional adapter LoRA. The default adapter is the LTX 2.3 Pop Art LoRA from Civitai.

e5d6895b-8933-4423-93c3-d81fb8315954.name: Turbo Sampling Steps
e5d6895b-8933-4423-93c3-d81fb8315954.label: advanced
e5d6895b-8933-4423-93c3-d81fb8315954.description: Base-pass sampling steps for Turbo mode. Short schedules are intended for fast iteration.

06e04a91-e64c-4ca1-8d7b-6abc3889cb14.name: Sampling Steps
06e04a91-e64c-4ca1-8d7b-6abc3889cb14.label: advanced
06e04a91-e64c-4ca1-8d7b-6abc3889cb14.description:
Number of sampling steps used in the base generation pass. The official guide calls for 8 steps in the distilled workflow and 20-50 in the full workflow.

[Official image-to-video guide: steps](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#steps)

ae0fba3e-b733-4435-b442-92371b84ae87.name: Video Frames
ae0fba3e-b733-4435-b442-92371b84ae87.label: config
ae0fba3e-b733-4435-b442-92371b84ae87.description:
Number of frames to generate. Keep to the standard counts used throughout the official examples, such as 65, 97, 121, 161, or 257. The official guide recommends 121-161 for balanced quality and memory usage, 65-97 for quick iterations, and 257 as the maximum.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame count](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-count)

3219c9c3-398b-4b33-b6a7-844ae8d2418d.name: Frame Rate
3219c9c3-398b-4b33-b6a7-844ae8d2418d.label: config
3219c9c3-398b-4b33-b6a7-844ae8d2418d.description:
Frames per second. Keep it matched across conditioning, upscale, and final video output. The official guide recommends 24 for a cinematic feel, 25 as the default standard, and 30 for smoother action.

[Official image-to-video guide: frame rate](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#frame-rate)

7156a03f-8372-4111-840b-a44385906f5e.name: Height
7156a03f-8372-4111-840b-a44385906f5e.label: config
7156a03f-8372-4111-840b-a44385906f5e.description: Output height from the selected resolution preset.

02d0bd92-5c19-4be8-a17e-89567d7c5d60.name: Reference Strength
02d0bd92-5c19-4be8-a17e-89567d7c5d60.label: advanced
02d0bd92-5c19-4be8-a17e-89567d7c5d60.description: How strongly the source image anchors the low-resolution pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 0.7.

d1c5769b-6637-4995-b0d7-c02c0edd11fd.name: Upscale Reference Strength
d1c5769b-6637-4995-b0d7-c02c0edd11fd.label: advanced
d1c5769b-6637-4995-b0d7-c02c0edd11fd.description: How strongly the source image anchors the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses 1.

7cbf86b5-0e53-49ee-8555-79174e199386.name: Upscale Manual Sigmas
7cbf86b5-0e53-49ee-8555-79174e199386.label: advanced
7cbf86b5-0e53-49ee-8555-79174e199386.description: Manual sigma schedule for the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses four values here.

1a3c5350-5af3-45fe-9c01-fa102a457d4b.name: Upscale
1a3c5350-5af3-45fe-9c01-fa102a457d4b.label: config
1a3c5350-5af3-45fe-9c01-fa102a457d4b.description:
Enable the second pass that doubles resolution and refines detail. Disable it to preview the base pass faster. The official guide recommends previewing Stage 1 first, then enabling the upscale pass once motion and framing are locked.

[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

777c9101-2c56-40ea-9be9-be59c36eece9.name: 2x
777c9101-2c56-40ea-9be9-be59c36eece9.label: config
777c9101-2c56-40ea-9be9-be59c36eece9.description: Enable the temporal x2 pass after the spatial upscale pass. This doubles the final framerate to preserve duration and is intended to be used together with Upscale.

8aeae72f-3f90-4ab9-a9f3-3c77ee9ea01d.name: Lora
8aeae72f-3f90-4ab9-a9f3-3c77ee9ea01d.label: config
8aeae72f-3f90-4ab9-a9f3-3c77ee9ea01d.description: Use the optional adapter LoRA for this generation.

d88d2fc8-a807-45c3-afdb-652e8551b78d.name: Adapter LoRA Trigger
d88d2fc8-a807-45c3-afdb-652e8551b78d.label: advanced
d88d2fc8-a807-45c3-afdb-652e8551b78d.description: Trigger text prepended to the prompt when the adapter LoRA is enabled. The default Pop Art adapter uses p0p-@rt.

e2c7351c-210f-4031-a137-e0a522053767.name: Seed
e2c7351c-210f-4031-a137-e0a522053767.label: config
e2c7351c-210f-4031-a137-e0a522053767.description:
Controls random variation. Keep it fixed for repeatable comparisons, or change it to explore motion variants.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)

74dbc81d-8c4c-4d91-b8f4-747b9fbe2823.name: Width
74dbc81d-8c4c-4d91-b8f4-747b9fbe2823.label: config
74dbc81d-8c4c-4d91-b8f4-747b9fbe2823.description: Output width from the selected resolution preset.

e14fb4da-6e85-4576-aeb9-422402a8b4a0.name: Model Variant
e14fb4da-6e85-4576-aeb9-422402a8b4a0.label: config
e14fb4da-6e85-4576-aeb9-422402a8b4a0.description: Select the LTX 2.3 model package used for generation.

0f6047bd-1043-4f47-bfb1-768bf1aa866e.name: Apply Adapter LoRA
0f6047bd-1043-4f47-bfb1-768bf1aa866e.label: advanced
0f6047bd-1043-4f47-bfb1-768bf1aa866e.description: Apply the optional adapter LoRA after the distilled LoRA.

f16cbbca-5b19-4eec-9746-2c61fbbcb8fb.name: Selected Model
f16cbbca-5b19-4eec-9746-2c61fbbcb8fb.label: advanced
f16cbbca-5b19-4eec-9746-2c61fbbcb8fb.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 model path and the adapter LoRA path.

97812f2e-29b7-4064-82eb-230f7407b802.name: NVIDIA FP4 Checkpoint URL
97812f2e-29b7-4064-82eb-230f7407b802.label: advanced
97812f2e-29b7-4064-82eb-230f7407b802.description: LTX 2.3 NVFP4 checkpoint from the Civitai FP4 package.

c339afab-7ba5-4862-a499-3a498f89dc2a.name: NVIDIA FP4 Text Projection URL
c339afab-7ba5-4862-a499-3a498f89dc2a.label: advanced
c339afab-7ba5-4862-a499-3a498f89dc2a.description: Text projection file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

1e5f0d7c-4260-4215-9e77-b0db6b1df216.name: NVIDIA FP4 Video VAE URL
1e5f0d7c-4260-4215-9e77-b0db6b1df216.label: advanced
1e5f0d7c-4260-4215-9e77-b0db6b1df216.description: Video VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

ca1ef7a4-e865-495c-becf-d5b9010e29de.name: NVIDIA FP4 Audio VAE URL
ca1ef7a4-e865-495c-becf-d5b9010e29de.label: advanced
ca1ef7a4-e865-495c-becf-d5b9010e29de.description: Audio VAE file paired with the Civitai FP4 package.

ef52b8fa-79da-4e2c-9089-4e08fe562bf8.name: Selected Checkpoint
ef52b8fa-79da-4e2c-9089-4e08fe562bf8.label: advanced
ef52b8fa-79da-4e2c-9089-4e08fe562bf8.description: Switches between the standard LTX 2.3 checkpoint and the NVIDIA FP4 checkpoint.

6efc14a4-28c0-4036-8498-d61c36ad540c.name: Selected Text Projection
6efc14a4-28c0-4036-8498-d61c36ad540c.label: advanced
6efc14a4-28c0-4036-8498-d61c36ad540c.description: Switches between the standard text projection and the NVIDIA FP4 package text projection.

bc8d25f3-99c2-4542-9faf-f4ed5409c9fd.name: Selected Video VAE
bc8d25f3-99c2-4542-9faf-f4ed5409c9fd.label: advanced
bc8d25f3-99c2-4542-9faf-f4ed5409c9fd.description: Switches between the checkpoint VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package video VAE.

f485eab2-23e0-4fd1-8322-e72d189277df.name: Selected Audio VAE
f485eab2-23e0-4fd1-8322-e72d189277df.label: advanced
f485eab2-23e0-4fd1-8322-e72d189277df.description: Switches between the standard audio VAE and the NVIDIA FP4 package audio VAE.

3d96b9c9-11b2-41af-b110-94f7dc3d4d16.name: Base Guidance
3d96b9c9-11b2-41af-b110-94f7dc3d4d16.label: advanced
3d96b9c9-11b2-41af-b110-94f7dc3d4d16.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the base pass. Upstream two-stage examples keep this close to 1.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

954418a6-82db-4331-9e41-376c2f5a8294.name: Base Sampler Type
954418a6-82db-4331-9e41-376c2f5a8294.label: advanced
954418a6-82db-4331-9e41-376c2f5a8294.description:
Sampler used in the base generation pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

1e20db48-6ef1-401d-be30-474ad2ec5315.name: Full Base Sampler Type
1e20db48-6ef1-401d-be30-474ad2ec5315.label: advanced
1e20db48-6ef1-401d-be30-474ad2ec5315.description: Base-pass sampler for the Full branch.

7f3ad3ee-b809-49a4-a157-074add450fd6.name: Turbo Base Sampler Type
7f3ad3ee-b809-49a4-a157-074add450fd6.label: advanced
7f3ad3ee-b809-49a4-a157-074add450fd6.description: Base-pass sampler for the Turbo branch.

38a94130-186e-4cc1-8300-046db1798f72.name: Base Shift
38a94130-186e-4cc1-8300-046db1798f72.label: advanced
38a94130-186e-4cc1-8300-046db1798f72.description: Scheduler shift value for the base pass.

62686d00-e265-43a8-9527-a2ecd31825e6.name: Batch Size
62686d00-e265-43a8-9527-a2ecd31825e6.label: advanced
62686d00-e265-43a8-9527-a2ecd31825e6.description: Number of videos generated in one run. Higher values need more memory.

1eb31d9b-f48d-42dc-9b0b-0e5c1f03222c.name: Disable Image Injection
1eb31d9b-f48d-42dc-9b0b-0e5c1f03222c.label: advanced
1eb31d9b-f48d-42dc-9b0b-0e5c1f03222c.description: Bypass image conditioning and behave more like text-to-video. Leave disabled for normal image-to-video use.

6cdfe655-7555-4caa-b9e8-d1ec578ff181.name: Frame Rate (float)
6cdfe655-7555-4caa-b9e8-d1ec578ff181.label: hidden
6cdfe655-7555-4caa-b9e8-d1ec578ff181.description: Floating-point fps value fed into conditioning and final video creation nodes.

03c5c1c1-6c8f-4bf6-98f2-46853748eb27.name: Float Zero
03c5c1c1-6c8f-4bf6-98f2-46853748eb27.label: hidden
03c5c1c1-6c8f-4bf6-98f2-46853748eb27.description: Hidden helper to cast integer fps controls onto floating-point paths.

3e3d8fe1-5185-4eac-b915-c80056f4103d.name: Float Two
3e3d8fe1-5185-4eac-b915-c80056f4103d.label: hidden
3e3d8fe1-5185-4eac-b915-c80056f4103d.description: Hidden helper to double FPS when interpolation is enabled.

dca2b7be-5e7e-45b0-89c4-3c801e5edbca.name: Interpolated Frame Rate (float)
dca2b7be-5e7e-45b0-89c4-3c801e5edbca.label: hidden
dca2b7be-5e7e-45b0-89c4-3c801e5edbca.description: Hidden helper that doubles the output FPS when interpolation is enabled.

173b5346-1734-4f91-88fa-d279f320acb1.name: Input Compression
173b5346-1734-4f91-88fa-d279f320acb1.label: advanced
173b5346-1734-4f91-88fa-d279f320acb1.description: Compression value used when preprocessing the source image for LTX conditioning.

c9892f44-efea-4407-9918-7449850f821b.name: Latent Scale Helper
c9892f44-efea-4407-9918-7449850f821b.label: advanced
c9892f44-efea-4407-9918-7449850f821b.description: Scale factor used to build the lower-resolution latent canvas before upscaling.

3c28b4d9-6e2e-48b7-ae3d-c53b1a431e3c.name: Guide Scale Helper
3c28b4d9-6e2e-48b7-ae3d-c53b1a431e3c.label: advanced
3c28b4d9-6e2e-48b7-ae3d-c53b1a431e3c.description: Scale factor used to size guide images before preprocessing and injection.

8f27a999-f733-4d5d-926d-a361797e346a.name: Max Shift
8f27a999-f733-4d5d-926d-a361797e346a.label: advanced
8f27a999-f733-4d5d-926d-a361797e346a.description: Upper scheduler shift bound for the base pass.

b0dff0e3-afdb-4841-9962-1a1881e7af28.name: Scale Method
b0dff0e3-afdb-4841-9962-1a1881e7af28.label: advanced
b0dff0e3-afdb-4841-9962-1a1881e7af28.description: Resampling method used when resizing images inside the workflow.

a99df465-c545-4fc0-b360-ebfc2142c039.name: Scheduler Terminal
a99df465-c545-4fc0-b360-ebfc2142c039.label: advanced
a99df465-c545-4fc0-b360-ebfc2142c039.description: Terminal value used by the LTX scheduler in the base pass.

420dddca-ae8e-45d4-9e43-d5147cec85bc.name: Stretch Schedule
420dddca-ae8e-45d4-9e43-d5147cec85bc.label: advanced
420dddca-ae8e-45d4-9e43-d5147cec85bc.description: Whether the base-pass scheduler stretches its schedule across the latent sequence.

26d99760-1844-4f7f-a406-84dc4e4430dc.name: Upscale Guidance
26d99760-1844-4f7f-a406-84dc4e4430dc.label: advanced
26d99760-1844-4f7f-a406-84dc4e4430dc.description:
Classifier-free guidance for the upscale pass. Keep it close to 1 unless you are intentionally retuning.

[Official image-to-video guide: CFG](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#cfg-classifier-free-guidance)

0f436b64-4f2c-4c2e-8d58-d6aadeca3078.name: Upscale Sampler Type
0f436b64-4f2c-4c2e-8d58-d6aadeca3078.label: advanced
0f436b64-4f2c-4c2e-8d58-d6aadeca3078.description:
Sampler used in the upscale pass. The upstream two-stage example uses euler_cfg_pp.

[Official image-to-video guide: sampler type](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#sampler-type)

d30cee21-b7e2-47b9-b12b-43ca1fad4aec.name: Upscale Seed
d30cee21-b7e2-47b9-b12b-43ca1fad4aec.label: config
d30cee21-b7e2-47b9-b12b-43ca1fad4aec.description:
Seed for the upscale pass. Keep it fixed to compare detail changes consistently. The official guide recommends fixed seeds when iterating and previewing Stage 1 versus the final upscale pass.

[Official image-to-video guide: seed](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#seed)
[Official image-to-video guide: Stage 2 upscale pass](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/image-to-video#stage-2-upscale-pass)

420fb118-7011-4591-84a3-42c12f09aad7.name: Resize Crop
420fb118-7011-4591-84a3-42c12f09aad7.label: config
420fb118-7011-4591-84a3-42c12f09aad7.description: How to handle aspect-ratio mismatch when resizing the source image. Center preserves aspect ratio by cropping; disabled stretches to fit.

769deca1-332c-4e1f-aa90-18e4fd91b876.name: Negative Prompt
769deca1-332c-4e1f-aa90-18e4fd91b876.label: advanced
769deca1-332c-4e1f-aa90-18e4fd91b876.description:
Describe unwanted motion, objects, style, or artifacts to avoid in the result. Keep it short, concrete, and focused on failure modes you do not want in the shot.

[Prompting guide: what to avoid](https://docs.ltx.video/open-source-model/usage-guides/prompting-guide#what-to-avoid)

value.immediate: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

2ec7455f-371a-48b5-8212-077affd0f96a.name: Adapter Prompt
2ec7455f-371a-48b5-8212-077affd0f96a.label: advanced
2ec7455f-371a-48b5-8212-077affd0f96a.description: Prompt with the adapter LoRA trigger prepended.

efa6a1a6-4296-4a5d-a91a-a177dab4ac97.name: Selected Prompt
efa6a1a6-4296-4a5d-a91a-a177dab4ac97.label: advanced
efa6a1a6-4296-4a5d-a91a-a177dab4ac97.description: Switches between the original prompt and the adapter-triggered prompt.

71440e65-c1f1-462a-81b7-63741f72d114.name: Selected Output Audio
71440e65-c1f1-462a-81b7-63741f72d114.label: advanced
71440e65-c1f1-462a-81b7-63741f72d114.description: Select which audio stream is attached to the final video output.

d35c2f56-6213-4414-8d6a-769a75865cfe.name: Selected Upscaled Frames
d35c2f56-6213-4414-8d6a-769a75865cfe.label: advanced
d35c2f56-6213-4414-8d6a-769a75865cfe.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the spatial result or the interpolated result.

c608ec2b-ff10-45f3-b146-9058cf790382.name: Selected Output Frames
c608ec2b-ff10-45f3-b146-9058cf790382.label: advanced
c608ec2b-ff10-45f3-b146-9058cf790382.description: Select whether the final video uses base-pass frames or the upscaled result.

73eafa72-1c57-45ad-988e-46147a8c57b3.name: Selected Upscaled FPS
73eafa72-1c57-45ad-988e-46147a8c57b3.label: hidden
73eafa72-1c57-45ad-988e-46147a8c57b3.description: Select whether the upscaled output uses the base FPS or doubled FPS for interpolation.

eef3917f-4ec1-4bba-bdd6-b818fabe6987.name: Selected Output FPS
